Package team44.project2.controller.manager.menu

package team44.project2.controller.manager.menu
Controllers for the menu-management screens accessible to managers.

Contains the MenuViewController which displays all menu items in a table with add, edit, and delete capabilities, and the MenuItemFormController which provides a form for creating or updating individual menu items including name, category, size, base price, and availability.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    team44.project2.controller.manager
    Controllers for the manager-facing screens of the point-of-sale application.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.employees
    Controllers for the employee-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory
    Controllers for the inventory-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.reports
    Controllers for the reporting screens accessible to managers.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    MenuItemFormController
    Controller for the menu-item form dialog used by managers to add new menu items or edit existing ones, including name, category, size, price, availability, and the associated inventory ingredient requirements.
    MenuViewController
    Controller for the menu-view screen in the manager dashboard, displaying all available menu items in a table and allowing managers to add, edit, and delete items.
